name: @chart-review/mcp-core-adherence
description: Transport-neutral MCP handlers for adherence tasks (list_questions, read_question, set_question_answer, get_adherence_state, set_review_status). The two adapters — mcp-server-adherence-anthropic (in-process Claude SDK) and mcp-server-adherence-stdio (subprocess for Codex) — wrap these.
